# Morning Standup

**Date:** March 16, 2026 at 9:00 AM
**Duration:** 12:34

## Transcript

Sarah mentioned the API migration is on track for Thursday. Dave flagged a blocker on the auth service — the token refresh endpoint is returning 500 errors intermittently. Alice volunteered to pair with Dave on debugging it this afternoon.

The design review for the new dashboard is scheduled for Wednesday. Product wants to ship the first version by end of sprint. We agreed to cut scope on the analytics panel and focus on the core metrics view first.

Action items: Dave and Alice to debug auth service, Sarah to update migration timeline doc, everyone to review the dashboard mockups before Wednesday.
